notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper ball physics, angle-based paddle bouncing, CPU AI, scoring, pause, and audio; minor issue is the serve direction logic sends ball toward wrong side (serveToward 'player' uses dir=1 which goes right toward CPU).
An exceptionally well-crafted Pong clone with flawless mechanics, smart CPU AI, perfect collision detection, and synthesized sound effects.
A solid single-player Pong clone with scoring, serving, pause, and game-over flow, but it lacks polish in control handling and gameplay balance so it is clearly good rather than flawless.
